# maximum

**Instance Property**

The highest possible number for the value.

## Declaration

```swift
var maximum: Double { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value to the metaparameter definition’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameterDefinition/maximum] property.

## Inspecting Extremes

- **minimum**: The lowest possible number for the value.
